cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: INNOTECH uses essential cookies to keep the website reliable and may use analytics-style signals to understand how visitors move through our pages.

sections.heading: What cookies support
sections.body: Cookies can help remember basic preferences, protect forms from abuse, measure page performance, and improve content such as insight pages, partner pages, and report navigation.

sections.heading: Your control
sections.body: You can limit or delete cookies through your browser settings. Some essential site features, including contact forms and navigation preferences, may work less smoothly when cookies are disabled.

gdpr.title: GDPR
gdpr.intro: INNOTECH treats personal data as limited business contact information and handles it with transparency, purpose limitation, and reasonable security controls.

sections.heading: Data we may process
sections.body: When you contact us, request a demo, ask about reports, or interact with partner-related services, we may process your name, business email, company, region, industry, and message.

sections.heading: Rights and requests
sections.body: Depending on your location, you may request access, correction, deletion, restriction, portability, or objection to processing. You can contact us at Info@innotech.global for privacy-related requests.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This policy explains how INNOTECH uses information submitted through the website to respond to business requests and improve our services.

sections.heading: How information is used
sections.body: We use submitted information to respond to inquiries, prepare meetings, provide service or report information, improve website experience, and maintain business records where required.

sections.heading: Sharing and retention
sections.body: We do not sell personal information. We may share limited details with service providers or relevant partners when needed to answer a request. Data is retained only as long as needed for the related business purpose.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: By using this website, you agree to use INNOTECH content, services, and report information for lawful business evaluation purposes.

sections.heading: Website content
sections.body: Articles, service descriptions, partner information, visuals, and report summaries are provided for general information and may change without notice.

sections.heading: No misuse
sections.body: You may not copy, scrape, disrupt, reverse engineer, or misuse the website, its forms, or its content. Commercial use of reports or materials may require a separate agreement.
